style_guide_name: Recoup Editorial Operating System v15 — Brand Typography

core_identity.purpose: Create premium editorial thumbnails for AI infrastructure, agents, and the creative economy.
core_identity.core_principle: Massive brand typography integrated with cinematic illustration.
core_identity.brand_position: Calm editorial software for the future creative economy.
core_identity.inspiration: Pebble-style brand thumbnails — full-bleed illustration with oversized brand wordmark spanning the frame, scene elements interacting with letterforms.

removed: Article title text on the image
added: Massive RECOUP wordmark spanning bottom 30-40% of frame
Scene elements interacting with letterforms (passing through, behind, in front)
No article title on image — caption carries the hook
Brand wordmark IS the design anchor

layout.top_60_percent: Full-bleed cinematic illustration — atmospheric, one powerful scene concept
layout.bottom_40_percent: Massive white RECOUP wordmark, edge to edge, with illustration elements interacting through the letterforms
layout.overlap_zone: The illustration and wordmark overlap naturally — objects pass behind, through, and in front of the letters

rules: No GUI containers, no window frames, no borders.
No article title on the image. The image is pure brand + atmosphere.
The RECOUP wordmark is the structural anchor of every composition.
One powerful visual concept per thumbnail — not a collage.
Illustration fills the entire frame edge to edge.
Scene elements must interact with the letterforms — not just sit on top.
The composition should read instantly at phone thumbnail size.
typography_interaction_examples: A robot standing inside the O
Cable or vine draping over the R
A small drone flying through the gap in the P
Atmospheric haze partially obscuring some letters
A structure casting a shadow across the letters

wordmark_system.size: Spans full width of frame with minimal side margins
wordmark_system.position: Bottom 30-40% of frame, vertically centered in that zone
wordmark_system.opacity: Full opacity (1.0) — the letters are bold and confident
wordmark_system.interaction: Scene elements pass in front of and behind the letters. Some letters may be partially occluded by foreground objects.
avoid: Text that sits cleanly on top without interacting with the scene
Drop shadows or glows on the text

style: Fine ink-style linework on edges and structures
Soft painterly rendering with visible brushwork
Atmospheric perspective — crisp foreground, hazy pale background
Studio Ghibli background paintings meets Makoto Shinkai atmosphere
mood: Lived-in futuristic — nature growing on technology
approved_subjects: Market scenes with robots and humans
rules: One focal point with strong atmospheric falloff.
Strong vanishing point composition when possible.
Foreground elements should be detailed; background fades to haze.
The scene must have enough visual mass in the bottom third to interact with the wordmark.
Pale ice-blue sky dominates upper portions.
Warm concrete and earth tones ground the lower portions.
Atmospheric perspective: foreground crisp, background fades to pale blue-white.
The white RECOUP wordmark must have sufficient contrast against whatever is behind it.

allowed: Matte gradients with watercolor bleeding edges

master_prompt_template.prompt: Semi-realistic anime-style illustration, full-bleed edge-to-edge, in the style of Studio Ghibli background paintings meets Makoto Shinkai atmospheric perspective. A lived-in futuristic world where nature grows on technology and small robots coexist with humans. Fine ink-style linework on edges and structures, soft painterly rendering with visible brushwork. Color palette: pale ice-blue sky (#D8E4EF), warm concrete ground (#E8E4DC), muted steel-blue accents (#5B7A90), dusty sage-green machinery (#B0BCA0), cool greys (#A8AEB4), small warm pops of golden-yellow (#C8A850). Everything muted and desaturated. Soft natural daylight, no dramatic shadows. Strong vanishing point, detailed foreground, hazy atmospheric background. In the bottom 30-40% of the frame, the word RECOUP appears in massive bold white sans-serif letters spanning nearly the full width. Scene elements interact naturally with these letters — objects pass behind, through, and in front of the letterforms. The illustration has visual mass in the lower portion that overlaps with the text.
master_prompt_template.negative_prompt: GUI container, window frame, macOS window, border, article title text, small logo stamp, photorealistic, CGI, cel-shaded flat anime, cyberpunk neon, oversaturated, pure black background, dashboard UI, gaming branding, glossy rendering, orange-teal grading, heavy shadows

pipeline_notes.generation: gpt-image-2 via Vercel AI Gateway, 1536x1024, quality=high
pipeline_notes.post_processing: None needed — the RECOUP wordmark is generated as part of the image by the AI model. No separate logo stamp step.
pipeline_notes.article_title: NOT on the image. Goes in the LinkedIn/X post copy only.
